title: lotus salsuginosus
intro: Lotus salsuginosus, also known as the water-chestnut or lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nelumbonaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to soothe and protect the body. The health benefits of lotus salsuginosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
